name: Mocha Truffles
recipeIngredient: Semisweet chocolate chips (2 packages, 12 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwave-safe bowl or double boiler, melt the semisweet chocolate chips.
2. Add the cream cheese, instant coffee, and water; mix well until smooth.
3. Chill the mixture until firm enough to shape into balls.
4. Shape the chilled mixture into 1-inch balls and place on a waxed paper-lined cookie sheet.
5. Refrigerate for 1-2 hours or until firm.
6. Melt the dark chocolate coating in a microwave-safe bowl or double boiler.
7. Dip the cooled truffles into the melted chocolate coating, allowing them to sit on waxed paper to harden.
8. If desired, melt white confectionery coating and drizzle over the chilled truffles.
9. Store truffles in an airtight container at room temperature for up to several months before dipping in chocolate. Thaw in the refrigerator before dipping.
